pwa.installDescription: Sanya don aikin fili ba tare da layi ba, loda cikin sauri, da sanarwar tura.

pwa.safariStep2: Gusar kuma danna Ƙara zuwa Fuskar Gida
pwa.safariStep3: Danna Ƙara — METARDU zai bayyana a Fuskar Gida ku kuma zai yi aiki ba tare da layi ba.

fieldMode.autoActivated: Yanayin Fili ya kunna ta atomatik

fieldMode.darkEnabledDesc: An canza komawa zuwa yanayin duhu na al'ada.
fieldMode.sensorNotSupported: Ma'aunin haske ba ya samuwa a wannan na'urar
fieldMode.tooltip: Yanayin fili: an inganta don karantawa a rana
